channel_contract.trace_source: minus the linear coefficient of the multiplicity-four characteristic polynomial

claim_gate.reason: The cubic trace formula survives holdout data, but interpolation gives neither an exact character identity nor the remaining quartic coefficients or root separation.

falsifiers_triggered: A cubic interpolation, even with holdout matches, is not an all-n character identity.
The trace alone does not determine a multiplicity-four spectrum.
Integer characteristic coefficients do not imply inverse-polynomial root separation.
A spectral theorem still would not supply a coherent circuit or decoder.

proof_obligation.character_sum: n(n-1)(n-2)/n! times sum_g chi_xi(g) chi_xi(g tau) chi_W(g c), with tau=(1 2), c=(1 2 3)
proof_obligation.exact_identity_to_prove: Tr H_n = 4*n^3 - 46*n^2 + 149*n - 118 on Hom_Sn(V_xi, V_xi tensor V_W)

summary: The cubic trace candidate 4*n**3 - 46*n**2 + 149*n - 118 matches 1/1 out-of-sample rows; an exact marked-cycle proof remains open.
